statements.sql: select "permissions".*, "role_has_permissions"."role_id" as "pivot_role_id", "role_has_permissions"."permission_id" as "pivot_permission_id" from "permissions" inner join "role_has_permissions" on "permissions"."id" = "role_has_permissions"."permission_id" where "role_has_permissions"."role_id" in (1)

explain.query: select "permissions".*, "role_has_permissions"."role_id" as "pivot_role_id", "role_has_permissions"."permission_id" as "pivot_permission_id" from "permissions" inner join "role_has_permissions" on "permissions"."id" = "role_has_permissions"."permission_id" where "role_has_permissions"."role_id" in (1)

statements.sql: select "id", "name", "slug", "organization_user"."user_id" as "pivot_user_id", "organization_user"."organization_id" as "pivot_organization_id", "organization_user"."is_default" as "pivot_is_default", "organization_user"."joined_at" as "pivot_joined_at", "organization_user"."invited_by" as "pivot_invited_by", "organization_user"."created_at" as "pivot_created_at", "organization_user"."updated_at" as "pivot_updated_at" from "organizations" inner join "organization_user" on "organizations"."id" = "organization_user"."organization_id" where "organization_user"."user_id" = 1 and "organizations"."deleted_at" is null order by "name" asc

explain.query: select "id", "name", "slug", "organization_user"."user_id" as "pivot_user_id", "organization_user"."organization_id" as "pivot_organization_id", "organization_user"."is_default" as "pivot_is_default", "organization_user"."joined_at" as "pivot_joined_at", "organization_user"."invited_by" as "pivot_invited_by", "organization_user"."created_at" as "pivot_created_at", "organization_user"."updated_at" as "pivot_updated_at" from "organizations" inner join "organization_user" on "organizations"."id" = "organization_user"."organization_id" where "organization_user"."user_id" = ? and "organizations"."deleted_at" is null order by "name" asc

statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = 'App\Models\User' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = 1 and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and "read_at" is null

explain.query: select count(*) as aggregate from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = ? and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = ? and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and "read_at" is null

statements.sql: select "id", "title", "body", "level" from "announcements" where "is_active" = 1 and ("starts_at" is null or "starts_at" <= '2026-03-15 03:28:47') and ("ends_at" is null or "ends_at" > '2026-03-15 03:28:47') and ("organization_id" is null) order by CASE WHEN organization_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "position" asc, "created_at" desc

explain.query: select "id", "title", "body", "level" from "announcements" where "is_active" = ? and ("starts_at" is null or "starts_at" <= ?) and ("ends_at" is null or "ends_at" > ?) and ("organization_id" is null) order by CASE WHEN organization_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "position" asc, "created_at" desc

statements.sql: select "terms_version_id" from "user_terms_acceptances" where "user_terms_acceptances"."user_id" = 1 and "user_terms_acceptances"."user_id" is not null

explain.query: select "terms_version_id" from "user_terms_acceptances" where "user_terms_acceptances"."user_id" = ? and "user_terms_acceptances"."user_id" is not null

statements.sql: select * from "terms_versions" where "is_required" = 1 and 1 = 1 order by "effective_at" asc

explain.query: select * from "terms_versions" where "is_required" = ? and 1 = 1 order by "effective_at" asc
